stylizeAppend: Premium German automotive design language: disciplined proportions, precise surfacing, confident stance, iconic light graphics, driver-centric clarity. Concept development and product-sketch quality—tangible materials (metal, glass, soft trim), believable panel gaps, design-studio visualization—not generic stock photography.
stylizeAppendExplicit: BMW design vocabulary: athletic proportions, L-shaped light signatures, Hofmeister kink family cue where relevant, kidney grille discipline as appropriate to the concept; motorsport-informed precision; Munich studio–level presentation.
geminiCollabAppend: Design context: premium automotive OEM studio—concept development, product sketch reasoning, concept-car visualization. Prefer disciplined surfacing language, clear hierarchy, and believable CMF over generic AI fluff.
geminiCollabAppendExplicit: Explicit brand alignment: think BMW Group design studio—athletic stance, precise details, iconic lighting and proportion language where relevant.
geminiBrainstormAppend: Same design studio context as Collab: automotive concept and product intent; build ideas that read as serious OEM design exploration.

imagenAppendExplicit: BMW-style concept car or product sketch visualization, OEM design quality.
